// Who We Are

PRECISION
MEETS
PURPOSE

We're a fresh, driven web development studio based in Nairobi, Kenya — built on the belief that every pixel matters. PixelByte Solutions partners with businesses and entrepreneurs to craft digital experiences that don't just look exceptional — they perform exceptionally.

Though we're new, our results aren't. With 50+ projects delivered, we build fast, modern websites using React and Next.js, tailored precisely to each client's goals.

React Next.js UI / UX Design Web Development Performance Tuning SEO Optimization

// What We Do

OUR
SERVICES

End-to-end digital solutions tailored to your business goals and built to last.

01

Web Design

Bespoke, conversion-focused designs built around your brand identity. We create layouts that guide users naturally toward action.

02

Development

Clean, maintainable code using modern frameworks. We engineer fast, scalable websites that perform under real-world conditions.

03

E-Commerce

Robust online stores built on Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom stacks — optimized for conversions and easy to manage.

04

Performance

Speed audits, Core Web Vitals optimization, and SEO foundation work to ensure your site ranks and loads fast on every device.

05

Maintenance

Ongoing support plans including security updates, content changes, uptime monitoring, and priority bug fixes.

06

Consulting

Strategic guidance on technology stack, digital roadmap, and architecture decisions to set your project up for long-term success.
